basics.address: Avenue des Faisans, Flic en Flac

amenities.ac: Available. Flic en Flac properties commonly have AC. Issues reported across portfolio include units not cooling properly, requiring technician visits.
amenities.laundry: Washing machines common in Flic en Flac properties (50 mentions across portfolio). Guests with toddlers frequently ask about availability.
amenities.beachAccess: Flic en Flac is a beachfront area. One of the most popular beach towns in Mauritius. Beach within walking distance.
amenities.nearbyGrocery: Flic en Flac has local shops and a small supermarket. Larger SuperU available by short drive.
amenities.nearbyPharmacy: Flic en Flac town has pharmacy access

transport.taxiInfo: Airport transfers arranged through Friday team. Guests can book via mauritiusattractions.com with code FRIDAYMU for 10% off.
transport.busRoutes: Bus service available along the main coastal road in Flic en Flac

commonGuestQuestions.question: Is there a washing machine?
commonGuestQuestions.answer: Needs verification for this specific property. Washing machine availability varies by unit.

commonGuestQuestions.question: How far is the beach?
commonGuestQuestions.answer: Flic en Flac beach is within walking distance. One of the best beaches in Mauritius.

commonGuestQuestions.question: Can we get a late checkout?
commonGuestQuestions.answer: Late checkout is subject to availability. We check our schedule and are often happy to accommodate when there is no same-day turnover.

commonGuestQuestions.question: Where is the nearest supermarket?
commonGuestQuestions.answer: Local shops in Flic en Flac town, short walk or drive. Larger supermarket available nearby.

commonGuestQuestions.question: Can you arrange airport transfer?
commonGuestQuestions.answer: Yes. Arranged through our team or via mauritiusattractions.com with code FRIDAYMU for 10% off.
